english translation text: Aaj bhi zainab ki aati hai sada bhai hussainEven today Zainab's call can be heard, O Brother Husain! English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Aaj bhi zainab ki aati hai sada bhai hussaintera chehra teri aankhein bhool kab payi hussain
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Even today Zainab's call can be heard, O Brother Husain,
How could I forget you O Hussain!

urdu transliteration text:
chalte naaqe se giraya khud ko jalti rayt parghutniyo ke bal mai teri laash tak aayi hussain
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I made myself fall from a moving camel onto the hot sand,
I came to your body while crawling on my knees

urdu transliteration text:
bas mai ghabrayi thi khanjar tujhpe chalta dekh karphit kisi mushkil may ghir kar mai na ghabrayi hussain
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I was distressed when I saw your throat being severed by the dagger,
After that I did not get distressed by any calamity that I faced

urdu transliteration text:
kaun tha jo marne walon may nahi tha khubarubhoolne baithi to kis kis ki na yaad aayi hussain
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
All of the Martyrs were brave and loyal,
I am unable to forget any of them        O Hussain!

urdu transliteration text:
beh rahe thay aankh se aansu teri ruqsat ke waqtphir koi aansu na tapka aankh pathrayi hussain
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Tears were flowing from my eyes at the time you departed,
After that not a single tear fell from my eye

urdu transliteration text:
haath may kooze liye sab aasman takte raheabr ne ek boodh pani ki na barsayi hussain
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Everyone was holding bowls and looking at the sky,
But the clouds did not shed even one drop of water, O Husain!

After I returned from my tragic journey,
I remembered your thirst O Husain!
